def validate_order(order):
    if order["total"] < 0:
        raise ValueError(f"Order {order['id']} has invalid total {order['total']:.2f} for customer {order['customer_id']}")

def fetch_user_profile(user_id, db):
    profile = db.get_user(user_id)
    if profile is None:
        raise LookupError(f"Failed to load profile for user_id={user_id}")
    return profile
